response.justification: While this candidate brings 15+ years of software development experience and strong communication skills, they critically lack the three mandatory technical requirements for this role. Their C++ experience is limited to approximately 6 months of professional work, far short of the required 5-10 years. They show SQL/MySQL knowledge but not the required SQL Server or Oracle expertise, and their domain experience is in investment technology and web platforms rather than capital markets or fixed-income systems. The fundamental technical gaps make this a poor fit for a specialist role requiring deep Windows-based C++ and enterprise database expertise.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development experience with demonstrated ability to learn diverse technology stacks
Strong communication and mentoring abilities evidenced by organizing workshops, technical talks, and training courses
Proven track record of building complex systems including real-time data platforms and scaling infrastructure
concerns: Severely limited C++ experience (~6 months professional) versus mandatory 5-10 years requirement; primary expertise is in web/mobile/TypeScript development
Missing required SQL Server or Oracle expertise; resume shows only generic SQL and MySQL background with no enterprise database experience demonstrated
Domain expertise mismatch—background is in web platforms, geo-data, and investment tech rather than capital markets, fixed-income products, or financial derivatives
